rules.name: 检测 systemd 服务持久化
rules.description: 检测 systemd 服务持久化
rules.author: security-sample-generator

detection.raw_rule:
// YARA 规则：持久化攻击检测
// 版本：1.0
// 日期：2026-03-21
// 覆盖：systemd 服务、crontab、启动项、注册表后门

rule Persistence_Systemd_Service {
    meta:
        description = "检测 systemd 服务持久化"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "persistence"
        mitre_id = "T1543.002"
    
    strings:
        $systemd_path = /\/etc\/systemd\/system|\/lib\/systemd\/system/i
        $service_file = /\.service$/
        $service_section = /\[Service\]/
        $exec_start = /ExecStart=/
        $wanted_by = /\[Install\].*WantedBy=multi-user/i
        $enable_cmd = /systemctl\s+enable|systemctl\s+start/i
    
    condition:
        ($systemd_path or $service_file) and $exec_start and ($wanted_by or $enable_cmd)
}

rule Persistence_Crontab {
    meta:
        description = "检测 crontab 持久化"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "persistence"
        mitre_id = "T1053.003"
    
    strings:
        $cron_path = /\/etc\/cron|\/var\/spool\/cron|crontab/i
        $cron_schedule = /@\w+|\d+\s+\d+\s+\d+\s+\d+\s+\d+/
        $reboot = /@reboot|reboot/i
        $shell_script = /\.sh\b|\/bin\/sh|\/bin\/bash/i
        $curl_wget = /\bcurl\b|\bwget\b/i
    
    condition:
        $cron_path and ($cron_schedule or $reboot) and ($shell_script or $curl_wget)
}

rule Persistence_Startup_Item {
    meta:
        description = "检测启动项持久化"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "persistence"
        mitre_id = "T1547.001"
    
    strings:
        $linux_startup = /\/etc\/init\.d|\/etc\/rc\.local|\.config\/autostart/i
        $macos_startup = /Library\/LaunchAgents|Library\/LaunchDaemons/i
        $windows_startup = /Startup|Run\\|CurrentVersion\\Run/i
        $plist_file = /\.plist$/
        $exec_key = /ProgramArguments|Exec|Command/i
    
    condition:
        ($linux_startup or $macos_startup or $windows_startup) and ($plist_file or $exec_key)
}

rule Persistence_Registry_Key {
    meta:
        description = "检测注册表持久化 (Windows)"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "high"
        attack_type = "persistence"
        mitre_id = "T1547.001"
    
    strings:
        $reg_run = /HKEY.*\\Run|CurrentVersion\\Run/i
        $reg_add = /reg\s+add|New-ItemProperty|SetValue/i
        $cmd_key = /\/d\s+.*\.exe|\/d\s+.*\.bat|\/d\s+.*\.ps1/i
        $hidden = /-WindowStyle\s+Hidden|hidden|silent/i
    
    condition:
        $reg_run and ($reg_add or $cmd_key)
}

rule Persistence_General {
    meta:
        description = "检测通用持久化行为"
        author = "security-sample-generator"
        date = "2026-03-21"
        version = "1.0"
        severity = "medium"
        attack_type = "persistence"
        mitre_id = "T1547"
    
    strings:
        $persist_keyword = /persistence|persistent|startup|autostart/i
        $boot_keyword = /boot|reboot|startup|launch/i
        $system_mod = /chmod \+x|chown|reg add|launchctl/i
        $daemon = /daemon|service|background/i
    
    condition:
        ($persist_keyword or $boot_keyword) and ($system_mod or $daemon)
}
